summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cockpit Immo MVP - French DC land prospection platform. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend loads with proper dark mode styling, authentication flow functional, and interactive features operational.
passed_tests: API root endpoint returns correct Cockpit Immo message
Admin stats endpoint returns database statistics (60 parcels, scores, users, shortlists)
Parcels endpoint returns parcels with computed scores for different project types
Parcels filtering by region (IDF) works correctly
Search project endpoint with project_type parameter returns scored results
Map parcels endpoint returns parcels for map display with geospatial data
Specific parcel endpoint returns detailed parcel data with multiple project type scores
Auth endpoints correctly return 401 for unauthenticated requests
Login page loads with proper dark mode Bloomberg terminal styling
Google Auth button is present and clickable
Dashboard loads correctly with session authentication
Interactive Leaflet map displays parcels with color-coded scoring
Navigation between Map, Table, and CRM views works
Table view displays all parcel data with proper headers
CRM view loads with shortlist management
Project type and region filters work correctly
Real-time data updates when filters are applied
